headline: Sabah Illegal Immigrant Problem Crosses 1.2 Million
context: Sabah state security committee estimated 1.2 million undocumented immigrants reside in the state comprising nearly 30% of total population.

cards.big: 1.2 million undocumented immigrants now comprise 30% of Sabah population
cards.sub: Security committee says numbers grew despite 2020 deportation operations

cards.big: Only 42,000 undocumented immigrants deported from Sabah in 2025
cards.sub: At that rate clearing the backlog would take approximately 29 years

cards.big: Sabah spent RM380 million on public services for undocumented residents
cards.sub: Federal government reimbursed only RM95 million of the state expenditure

cards.big: ESSCOM recorded 180 illegal border crossings per week in eastern waters
cards.sub: Maritime patrol assets cover only 40% of 1,400km eastern coastline

cards.big: Immigration scale tests whether border security matches the severity of the challenge
1.2 million undocumented immigrants in Sabah — enforcement without documentation reform creates a permanent underclass.
